unit.name: WP_HTTP_Proxy bypass routing Haxe parity candidate
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http-proxy.php public class shell backed by src/wphx/wp/http/HttpProxyStrategy.hx
unit.public_contract: The candidate preserves the WP_HTTP_Proxy public PHP class/method ABI while delegating the post-filter send_through_proxy host/bypass decision to generated Haxe PHP. PHP keeps parse_url, get_option('siteurl'), pre_http_send_through_proxy, constants, and authentication header boundaries.

bridge.removal_gate: Promote from candidate shell to generated original-path adapter only after class-wp-http-proxy.php ownership/linker work proves reflection, include timing, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution behavior, and live/recorded proxy transport parity.
